mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.name, a.avatarUrl FROM user_playback_history h INNER JOIN artists a ON a.id = h.artist_id WHERE h.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY h.artist_id ORDER BY MAX(h.played_at) DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT s.id, s.title, a.name AS artistName, s.coverUrl, s.duration, MAX(h.played_at) AS playedAt FROM user_playback_history h INNER JOIN songs s ON s.id = h.song_id INNER JOIN artists a ON a.id = h.artist_id WHERE h.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY h.song_id ORDER BY MAX(h.played_at) DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_artist_follows WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_playback_history (user_id, song_id, artist_id, played_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{songId}, #{artistId}, #{playedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM user_playback_history WHERE artist_id = #{artistId} AND played_at >= DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE, '%Y-%m-01') AND played_at < DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m-01')
